sentences.text: one stubborn horse written by harriet rosenblum illustrated by colin jack
focus question how do you know the horse is stubborn
i pushed the horse she would not move
i pulled the horse she would not move
i fed the horse she would not move
i tickled the horse she would not move
i washed the horse she would not move
i brushed the horse she would not move
i begged the horse she would not move
i give up she is one stubborn horse
connections writing and art change the ending of this book draw a picture and write about it science draw a diagram of a horse label five body parts
